name: Shift Timesheets
description: Captures weekly contractor timesheets with auto rates, travel, and billing variance rollups.
changelog: Depends on HR: enable Time Billing only with HR enabled. Contractor create/update/password/status APIs removed — use HR → Employees / Edit profile. Staff role APIs unchanged.

scheduler_week_prefill_enabled.tooltip: If enabled, the weekly timesheet is prefilled from schedule_shifts (scheduled times + clock data when present).

scheduler_source_scheduled_edit_allowed.tooltip: If false, staff cannot edit scheduled_start/end on scheduler-prefilled entries (they can still override actual times).
